business_context.industry_terms: 食品饮料贸易、B2B批发、库存管理、供应链、运费成本、订单履约、产品类别、供应商管理、销售区域、员工业绩
business_context.business_rules: 关注产品类别销售趋势，重视供应商稳定性和交货及时性，分析不同国家和地区的客户需求差异，监控运费成本优化物流，注重订单履约率和客户满意度
business_context.data_characteristics: 包含产品(products)、类别(categories)、供应商(suppliers)、客户(customers)、员工(employees)、订单(orders)、订单明细(orderdetails)、承运商(shippers)等核心业务数据，支持订单到发货的完整业务链分析
business_context.analysis_focus: 产品销售分析、客户价值分析、供应商绩效分析、员工业绩分析、区域市场分析、运费成本分析、订单时效分析

example_queries.query: 查看销售额最高的产品
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) as TotalSales FROM orderdetails od JOIN products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries.description: 分析产品销售排名，识别畅销产品

example_queries.query: 各产品类别的销售情况
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(DISTINCT od.ProductID) as ProductCount, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) as TotalSales FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID JOIN orderdetails od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY c.CategoryID, c.CategoryName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
example_queries.description: 按产品类别分析销售额和产品数量分布

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT c.CompanyName, c.Country, COUNT(o.OrderID) as OrderCount, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) as TotalAmount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN orderdetails od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName, c.Country ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries.description: 分析高价值客户，了解主要客户来源国家

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT CONCAT(e.FirstName, ' ', e.LastName) as EmployeeName, e.Title, COUNT(o.OrderID) as OrderCount, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) as TotalSales FROM employees e JOIN orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN orderdetails od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
example_queries.description: 评估员工销售绩效，支持业绩考核

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT p.ProductName, c.CategoryName, s.CompanyName as Supplier, p.UnitsInStock, p.ReorderLevel, p.UnitsOnOrder FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID JOIN suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID WHERE p.UnitsInStock <= p.ReorderLevel AND p.Discontinued = 0 ORDER BY (p.ReorderLevel - p.UnitsInStock) DESC
example_queries.description: 识别库存不足需要补货的产品

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT s.CompanyName as ShipperName, COUNT(o.OrderID) as ShipmentCount, AVG(o.Freight) as AvgFreight, SUM(o.Freight) as TotalFreight FROM orders o JOIN shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID WHERE o.ShippedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.ShipperID, s.CompanyName ORDER BY ShipmentCount DESC
example_queries.description: 分析各承运商的使用频率和运费成本

订单金额.explanation: 订单商品的销售金额，需考虑单价、数量和折扣

产品类别.explanation: 产品的分类体系，Northwind 有8大类包括饮料、调味品、糖果、乳制品等

库存管理.explanation: 跟踪产品库存水平，包括当前库存、再订购点和在途订购

客户管理.explanation: 客户公司信息和联系人

订单物流.explanation: 订单的发货和物流信息，包括承运商和发货日期
